WPFHardwareSummary.Description: CPU, RAM, GPU, motherboard, and storage from WMI/CIM; export to PDF or PNG.

WPFDnsManager.Description: Presets (Cloudflare, Google, Quad9, ...), custom IPv4/IPv6, DHCP reset; apply to selected or all adapters.

WPFStartupManager.Description: Registry Run / RunOnce and Startup folder entries; enable or disable; show path and publisher when available.

WPFWindowsUpdatePolicy.Description: Defer feature/quality updates, disable automatic updates (policy), or clear Clark policy keys.

WPFDiskToolsWizard.Description: SMART/health summary, chkdsk scan, diskpart list script; destructive actions require confirmation.

WPFAppRemovalTool.Description: List programs from registry uninstall keys, uninstall selection, optional restore point, leftover scan (preview).
